label: Live Scores
description: Compact horizontal ticker of live and suspended fixtures with scores and match clock.

0.6.note: No async loading path — data is synchronous filtered from context.

0.7.note: Empty state: 'No live matches' renders when liveRows.length===0.

1.1.note: Data via useSportsData().filteredFixtures — no inline fetch.

1.3.note: Org filter affects bets; fixture ticker is scope-agnostic (public event data).

1.6.note: Empty scope shows all live fixtures.

1.7.note: No reference data in widget file.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (primary use case), paper ✓ (same display), batch ✓ (no live matches in batch — empty state shown).

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode() → isBatch filters to completed; ticker shows empty state in batch mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode: ticker displays normally — no trade actions in this widget.

3.6.note: No interval or WebSocket in widget file. WS status indicator reflects context wsStatus — no direct WS in widget.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human checks 3.3/3.4 pending.

4.1.note: Buttons click setSelectedFixtureId — meaningful action. No dead buttons.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human checks 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 pending.

5.1.note: Target strategies: sports-betting, sports-arb. Acts as live score summary; clicking a fixture drives detail panel selection.

l5.notes: Agent check 5.1 complete. Human walkthrough pending.

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests not yet written for sports domain.

7.1.note: shadow-[inset_0_-2px_0_0_hsl(var(--primary))] uses design token var(--primary) inside hsl() — acceptable (token-driven, not hardcoded). No bare hex/rgb colors.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: useMemo deps are stable (filteredFixtures from context). No inline object/array literals in deps.

l7.notes: 7.5 globally deferred. text-[10px]/text-[8px]/text-[9px] fixed in L8.1 via new text-micro/text-pico/text-nano tokens.

8.1.note: FIXED: text-micro (10px), text-pico (8px), text-nano (9px) tokens now applied in place of text-[10px]/text-[8px]/text-[9px] arbitrary values at lines 18,38,58,59,62,63.

8.3.note: Uses <button> primitives directly — appropriate for compact ticker control-bar.

8.4.note: Agent: buttons have type='button', no img without alt. Human: keyboard walk pending.

8.5.note: Human-only: resize test at minW=3/minH=1 pending.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed — text-micro/text-pico/text-nano tokens landed in globals.css and applied. 8.2-8.3 pass. 8.4-8.5 human pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Live scores ticker is a compact control-bar widget (minH=1) — distinct UX role from full fixtures list. Both can coexist in layout.

relationships.notes: Clicking a live score tile sets selectedFixtureId in context, driving sports-fixture-detail.

dataContract.notes: Live score updates via WebSocket; widget derives liveRows from filteredFixtures via useMemo.

gaps: Only football leagues in mock data; no other sports types
coverage.notes: Compact ticker showing live/suspended fixtures only.

findings.description: sports-live-scores-widget.tsx:18,38,58,59,62,63 — text-[10px], text-[8px], text-[9px] used for compact ticker typography
findings.fix: Replaced arbitrary text-[Npx] with design tokens: text-micro (10px) at lines 18/58/59/62, text-pico (8px) at line 38, text-nano (9px) at line 63. Tokens defined in app/globals.css under @theme (--text-micro/--text-nano/--text-pico).
Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: sports-live-scores-widget.tsx — WS connection status dot (lines 32-35) used bg-emerald-400/bg-amber-400/bg-red-400 and fixture status dot (line 55) used bg-amber-400/bg-emerald-400 hardcoded palette
findings.fix: Replaced palette colors with semantic CSS var tokens: connected→bg-[var(--status-live)], connecting→bg-[var(--status-warning)] animate-pulse, error/disconnected→bg-[var(--status-critical)]; SUSP→bg-[var(--status-warning)], live→bg-[var(--status-live)] animate-pulse.
